description: Catalog of Claude Code plugins and marketplaces used across the FlexNetOS meta workspace.

plugins.summary: Harness-native engineering plugin for Claude Code and adjacent harnesses: agents, skills, command shims, hooks, rules, and MCP conventions for engineering teams.
Multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code: planner/architect/designer agents, consensus planning (ralplan), team workflows, and lifecycle hooks.
Claude Code plugin marketplace. Lists the `meta` (multi-repo workspace) and `gitkb` (knowledge base + code intelligence) plugins, both installed git-subdir.
plugins.notes: Marketplace 'gitkb' lists 2 plugins: meta (git-subdir gitkb/meta @ claude-plugin) and gitkb (git-subdir gitkb/gitkb-claude-plugin @ plugin).

plugins.summary: Meta-skill (/harness:harness) that turns a domain description into an agent team plus the skills they use, with six team-architecture patterns; also ships packaged harnesses (meta-plugin repo-org loop, rust-port, feature-forge, bootstrap, planning-engineer) you run in place or eject into a repo.
plugins.notes: Lives in the harness_hub repo at harness/; enabled as harness@harness-marketplace via a directory marketplace. Forked from revfactory/harness (Apache-2.0). The packaged /harness:meta-plugin loop is the meta-repo's repo-organization harness; many harness:* agents power the loop tooling.

plugins.summary: Anthropic's official Claude Code plugin marketplace. Used across the workspace for rust-analyzer-lsp (enabled); also provides claude-code-setup, code-review, frontend-design, github, hookify, playwright, ralph-loop, superpowers, typescript-lsp, ui5-typescript-conversion.
plugins.notes: Third-party (Anthropic) pointer — not hosted in the FlexNetOS org. Enabled from it: rust-analyzer-lsp@claude-plugins-official. The other plugins are cached/available; enable per-repo as needed. Owner: Anthropic (support@anthropic.com).
